title: oxyacantha monogyna var. rosea
intro: Oxyacantha monogyna var. rosea, also known as the Pink Dog Rose or Rosa rubiginosa, is a flowering shrub native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its single pink flowers and woody stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Oxyacantha monogyna var. rosea include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical applications, such as salves and creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
